# Plan: Manual Verification

## Epics
### EPIC-001 — Verify Room Creation and Negotiation
This epic verifies that the room-000 creation and negotiation process works as expected.
- Task 1: Verify room-000 creation.
- Task 2: Verify negotiation process.

#### Definition of Done
- [ ] room-000 exists in the war-rooms directory.
- [ ] Negotiation logs indicate successful channel setup.

#### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Start-Plan.ps1 completes without triggering unwanted expansion.
- [ ] Room-000 is created and initialized.
